stanzas: <div>Vaadi Vaadi Vaadi Song Lyrics Sachin

enakku music-a paththi
enna theriyuma
peter akkakku nammala

abhi dhekko choopishthaanu.

hey vaadi vaadi vaadi
kaipadaatha CD
hey vaadi vaadi vaadi vaadi
kaipadaatha CD
thousand watts bulbu pola
kannu koosudhedi

naan avuthuvidum paatula
pala vislu satham naattula(2)
puriyadha raagamellaam
thevayilla

ada kaelu kaelu
idhu gaana paatu
neraa un nenjukulla
serum paattu

ada disco vandhaalum
kisko vandhaalum
oram pogathu indha paatu

michael vandhaalum
madonaa vandhaalum
thoththu pogathu
Tamizh gaanaa paattu

hey vaadi vaadi vaadi vaadi
kaipadaatha CD
thousand watts bulbu pola
kannu koosudhedi

Yei peter, enn aquarter
avan thallikinnu poradhu
un daughter

hey raamu coolu maamu
nee aaduradhu day and nightu
gameu

pathinettu vayasula pesikkitta
thappilla
thottapetta malaiya pakkam
yeraadhe

bottle-na kulukku da
thaetre-na kalakku da
Sachin oda policy maaraadhu

kelu kelu idhu gaana paatu
kavalaikellaam ..
kodukkum paattu

ada Rapu vandhaalum
Jazz-u vandhaalum
kaaram kuraiyaadhu
indha paattu..
podu...

ada rock-u vandhaalum
break-u vandhaalum
shake-u aagaathu
tamizh gaana paatu.
Vaadi vaadi..

Hey dasu ennaa ravusu
vaari eraikkaadha
appanoda kaasu

ye somu edhuku flimu
nee neeyaaga vazhdhu
paaru maamu

ada bandhaa edukkuda
konjam adakkudaa
nethu vara naayar
kada bunnu thane

figure-a madakkathaan
pizza hutu ketkudhaa
naasthaku kaiyendhi
bavan thaane

kelu kelu idhu gaana paattu
ne thaanaga thaththuvam
sollum paattu

ada medhai endraalum
pedhai endraalum
vedham polaagum
indha paattu

ada kelavi aanaalum
kumari aanaalum
kooththaada vaikkum

hey vaadi vaadi vaadi vaadi

seo.title: Vaadi Vaadi Vaadi Song Lyrics Sachin
seo.description: Full Vaadi Vaadi Vaadi songs lyrics, Sachein Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Devi Sri Prasad(DSP), Singer(s): Vijay.
seo.keywords: Sachein, Devi Sri Prasad(DSP), Vijay, Vaadi Vaadi Vaadi full lyrics, Sachein songs lyrics, Vaadi Vaadi Vaadi lyrics snippets, Vaadi Vaadi Vaadi WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Vaadi Vaadi Vaadi lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Vaadi Vaadi Vaadi conveys a lively and carefree spirit, celebrating music and enjoyment.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Sachein, this song highlights moments of joy and celebration, showcasing the protagonist's vibrant personality.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Vijay and composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was the song released?

Vaadi Vaadi Vaadi was released on April 14, 2005.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaadi Vaadi Vaadi, the protagonist expresses a carefree attitude towards life and music, inviting everyone to join in the celebration. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and excitement, making it a perfect dance number. This song encapsulates the essence of youthful exuberance and the thrill of living in the moment. The vibrant energy of Vijay's performance, combined with Devi Sri Prasad's dynamic composition, makes it a memorable highlight of Sachein.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaadi Vaadi Vaadi is a vibrant anthem that showcases Vijay's electrifying vocals paired with the dynamic beats of Devi Sri Prasad. This song from the movie Sachein is perfect for lifting spirits and getting everyone on the dance floor. Experience the infectious energy that makes this track a must-listen!
